label: [business:sales] Book a qualifying call CTA
description: Primary conversion action across both emails: prospect books a call to see if they qualify. Framed as qualification (they apply to you), not a sales pitch.
evidence: Book a call to see if you qualify for The Game of Lyfe

label: [business:sales] Escape the default life script
description: The aspirational outcome sold to the prospect: stop following society's pre-programmed path and design your own life as an intentional game with mechanics you control.
evidence: If you're ready to turn your life into a game YOU'RE actually designing...

label: [business:sales] Qualification framing inverts sales dynamic
description: The CTA is framed as the prospect qualifying for the program, not the program selling to them. This is a deliberate positioning constraint that filters for committed leads.
evidence: Book a call to see if you qualify for The Game of Lyfe
